cascade: 1. If NER/dicts/alias yields BRAND → use it; do NOT call clf
2. If category-only → brand=null (NO_BRAND); do NOT call clf
3. Else if brand-evidence (alias or modelish) → call clf
4. Else → brand=null; do NOT call clf

special_labels.UNKNOWN: OOD / ambiguous; output brand=null + optional retrieval

accept_rules: pred in brands and P>=TAU_ACCEPT and margin>=TAU_MARGIN → accept
